name: Lucifer (RPG)
description:
This takes place within the Lucifer Universe. A free for all RPG where you can insert yourself into their world.

The timeline of this is mostly season 2-3. This bit has mostly been designed for 3rd person POV :)

Tried to make it gender neutral at the start so anyone of any pronouns can use this :)
___
I originally made this for myself since there weren't any other bots that fit what I was looking for. It's public just in case others want to use it!

I will be making updates as time goes on as if there are any reviews / needed updates.
creator: Syn
